reference: Hi, I took three Cytotec vaginally a year ago to have an abortion. I did not get it from a doctor; I obtained it from a friend. An hour after taking it, I experienced cramps and started bleeding. A few minutes after the bleeding began, I passed a significant amount of clotted blood. I bled for three weeks after that. It has been a year since using this pill, and I have been trying to get pregnant for six months now, but I have had no positive results. Can I still get pregnant after using Cytotec? Please help!
text: Hi. I took 3 sitatech vaginally a year ago to have an abortion. I did not get it from a doctor; I obtained it from a friend. An hour after taking it, I experienced cramps and started bleeding. A few minutes after the bleeding began, I passed a significant amount of clotted blood. I bled for 3 weeks after that. It has been a year since using this pill, and I have been trying to get pregnant for 6 months now, but I have had no positive results. Can I still get pregnant after using cytotch? Please help.
